library: בודליאן אוקספורד · בודליאן אוקספורד · בודליאן אוקספורד
description: Copy of a letter from Shemuel Gaon b. Hofni to the community in Fez. The beginning of the 11th century, handwriting of Sahlan b. Avraham. Mentions tragic events that took place in Fez, including killing of community members and destroying of the synagogue. The writer sends his deep condolences. The letter was probably sent from Baghdad through Fustat and Sahlan copied parts of it. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #51) VMR
tags: Babylonian Geonim, Shemuel b. Hofni, communal, Fez
description_he: העתק מכתב שמואל גאון בן חופני לקהילת פאס, תחילת המאה ה-11, על טבח יהודים ויותר חורבן בית הכנסת
